channel.title: Wxt on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Wxt on Drupal WxT

item.title: Roadmap
item.description: Vision Statement The Drupal WxT distribution is a web content management system which assists in building and maintaining innovative Web sites that are accessible, usable, and interoperable. The primary goal of Drupal WxT is to provide an enterprise level platform that can assist governments and larger organizations in disseminating data. Mandatory Features There are a lot of features inherently provided by Drupal WxT. However there are a few that have been designated as mandatory to support and as such have shaped the architecture of the distribution.

item.title: Repositories for Drupal WxT
item.description: The following table is a list of all the repositories that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Name Website Description Size composer-extdeps drupalwxt/composer-extdeps Composer repository for external dependencies on Drupal WxT Size: 20 Bytes docker-scaffold drupalwxt/docker-scaffold Docker Scaffold for Drupal WxT Size: 67 Bytes drupalwxt.github.io drupalwxt/drupalwxt.github.io GH pages for Drupal WxT. Size: 11135 Bytes helm-drupal drupalwxt/helm-drupal Drupal helm chart for Kubernetes.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 3.0.12 2020-06-19T23:40:14Z Security updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.8.8 SA-CORE-2020-004 SA-CORE-2020-005 SA-CORE-2020-006 Features/Updates: - Update Lightning 4.1.5 - Update acquia_connector to 1.22 - Update admin_toolbar to 2.3 - Update bootstrap_layouts to 5.2 - Update button_link to 1.
